arts.ttl: Cyriel Dessers has Rangers shirt ripped off in penalty KB as McCoist erupts at 'embarrassing' ref – 'holy smokes'
arts.sum: The big Nigerian was adamant Rangers should have had a spot kick in Bilbao

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Catalan giants 'make £47m Nico Williams decision' ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Barcelona will reportedly not reignite their interest in Athletic Bilbao attacker Nico Williams during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Athletic Bilbao vs Rangers LIVE as bonkers team rumours swirls around the Basque Country
arts.sum: Rangers live for Thursday nights but outlasting their esteemed foes in the raucous San Mames is a career-defining test

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed a major boost as Barcelona 'drop out of the race' to sign summer target Nico Williams
arts.sum: Arsenal will bolster their attack ahead of next season, having seen a shortage of forwards derail their title charge this term - and Mikel Arteta is said to be a huge admirer of Williams.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid injury, suspension news vs. Athletic Bilbao: Kylian Mbappe, Dani Carvajal, Eder Militao, Ferland Mendy updates
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at Real Madrid's injury and suspension news ahead of their La Liga clash with Athletic Bilbao.

arts.ttl: Celtic and Rangers guard of honour debate rages on as Hotline claim 'Simply the Best' should be blared for the champions
arts.sum: Anthony Evans took your calls as Hotline callers remain split on whether the Hoops should be applauded onto the field by Gers if they win the league before they go to Ibrox

arts.ttl: Barry Ferguson and his 6 Rangers boosts as Bilbao date with destiny sees major squad calls - predicted XI
arts.sum: The Light Blues are bidding to reach the Europa League semi-final as they bid to produce another historic night on European scene

arts.sum: The Belgium star has caught the eye of late and has been linked with a move to one of Europe's top five leagues

arts.ttl: Celtic and Rangers can become hotbed for more Brazilian talent as Selecao cult hero fires Athletic Bilbao warning
